name: Jade Flashwing
description: Jade Flashwing is a green and gold version of the Earth Skylander, Flashwing.
biography: Flashwing's origins are a mystery, though her first appearance was quite spectacular. When Bash made a wish on a falling star that he could fly, he watched as a glowing geode fell from the sky and landed in the heart of a valley. Inside that geode was the beautiful but lethal Flashwing. Bash may not have gotten his wings that day, but Flashwing certainly made an impact.
personality: Graceful and elegant, Jade Flashwing possesses a fierce spirit and a sharp wit. While she can be somewhat vain about her beautiful crystalline appearance, she is a formidable warrior who doesn't hesitate to jump into the fray to protect her fellow Skylanders.

story.content: Jade Flashwing is a green and gold version of the Earth Skylander, Flashwing. She and Jade Fire Kraken are currently the only Jade Skylanders, likely a reference to real world Jade Dragons, carved statues made from mineral from China. This is particularly fitting for Flashwing, as jade is a real world gem, and Flashwing herself is based on gems and precious minerals, growing them from her body.

trivia: Jade Flashwing, Prism Break and Crusher have green crystals around their bodies.
She and Jade Fire Kraken are currently the only Jade Skylanders.
They are also both counterparts of dragons who didn't appear in Spyro's Adventure.
The fact that only dragon Skylanders have Jade counterparts may be a reference to real world Jade Dragons, carved statues made from the mineral from certain places in China.
This is particularly fitting for Flashwing, as jade is a real world gem, and Flashwing herself is based on gems and precious minerals, growing them from her body.
gameplay: Jade Flashwing can launch crystal shards from her tail spike at enemies, like a scorpion shooting poison spikes. She can also twirl around, hitting enemies with her crystalline wings, and summon a large crystal from the ground to allow light to beam through it and strike enemies surrounding it.

basic.name: Crystal Shards
basic.content: Shoot crystal shards from your tail at enemies.

basic.name: Shimmering Spin
basic.content: Spin around, hitting enemies with your wings.

basic_upgrades.name: Surrounded by Shards
basic_upgrades.content: Spinning creates a ring of crystals that damage enemies.

soulgems.name: Crystal Lighthouse
soulgems.content: A giant crystal beam shoots from the ground, damaging all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Light Speed Lasers
abilities.content: Upgraded lasers move at even higher speeds.
